testcase.name: Complete Hybrid MISRA Workflow › Complete Hybrid Workflow - Regular Browser to Playwright Automation
testcase.system-out:
🚀 Starting Complete Hybrid Workflow 📍 Step 1: Starting localhost server... ⏳ Waiting for server to initialize... ✅ Localhost server started successfully ✅ Server connectivity verified 📍 Step 2: Opening localhost in your default browser... ✅ Localhost opened in your default browser 🌐 URL: http://localhost:3000 📍 Step 3: Preparing Playwright browser for MISRA automation... ✅ Playwright browser ready for MISRA automation
🎯 Starting Complete Hybrid Workflow Test
🔵 PHASE 1: LOCALHOST IN YOUR BROWSER (MANUAL) 📋 Please complete the following in your browser: 1. Enter your Full Name, Email, and Mobile Number 2. Click "Send OTP" and wait for email from ceo@digitransolutions.in 3. Enter the 6-digit OTP and click "Verify & Login" 4. Click the "TEST" button when you see the dashboard ⏰ Waiting for you to complete registration and click TEST button... ⏳ Waiting for TEST button to be clicked in your browser... 💡 If you get "Network error", please refresh the page and try again Server: 📧 User registered: Sanjana (sanjsr125@gmail.com) Server Error: ❌ Error triggering OTP: Could not find name input field on the page 📊 Session status: OTP verified=false, Test running=false 📧 User: sanjsr125@gmail.com 📊 Session status: OTP verified=false, Test running=false 📧 User: sanjsr125@gmail.com 📊 Session status: OTP verified=false, Test running=false 📧 User: sanjsr125@gmail.com 📊 Session status: OTP verified=false, Test running=false 📧 User: sanjsr125@gmail.com ❌ Timeout waiting for TEST button click 🧹 Cleaning up... ✅ Playwright browser closed ✅ Localhost server stopped

error.message: TEST button was not clicked within 5 minutes

testcase.error:
